title: Dental Implant Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 2 — International dental implant company establishing Saudi manufacturing for GCC market
executive_summary:
Dental implants — titanium screws and crowns replacing missing teeth — are among the fastest-growing segments of the medical device market driven by aging populations and increasing dental health awareness. Saudi Arabia's expanding dental care system, Vision 2030 health improvement targets, and growing private dental clinic market create significant domestic demand. All dental implants consumed in Saudi Arabia are currently imported.

Dental implant manufacturing uses precision CNC titanium machining (the implant body), surface treatment (sandblasting and acid etching for osseointegration), and ceramic crown processing — manufacturing processes that are accessible to Saudi Arabia's precision manufacturing and materials sectors. The materials (Grade 4 and Grade 5 medical titanium) are commercially available internationally.

The global dental implant market was valued at $5.1 billion in 2024 growing at 9.3% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's domestic dental implant market is estimated at $180–250 million annually and growing at 12% driven by dental care coverage expansion. A Saudi manufacturer serving the GCC — UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain — adds $200–300 million in addressable export market.

companies.name: Straumann Group
companies.rationale: Straumann is the global dental implant market leader with manufacturing JV experience. A Saudi Straumann facility would benefit from Swiss brand premium and GCC market access.

companies.name: Dentsply Sirona
companies.rationale: Dentsply Sirona is the world's largest dental company with active Middle East market presence. Manufacturing localisation for Saudi market.

companies.name: Osstem Implant
companies.rationale: Osstem is Asia's largest dental implant manufacturer with competitive manufacturing costs and international partnership experience.

companies.name: MIS Implants Technologies
companies.rationale: MIS is a global dental implant manufacturer. Subject to normalisation.

companies.name: Bredent Medical
companies.rationale: Bredent is a German dental device manufacturer with international manufacturing partnerships.

partners.name: Saudi Council for Health Specialties
partners.current: Dental specialisation licensing; healthcare professional standards
partners.upgrade: Saudi-manufactured implant clinical validation programme; Saudi dental society endorsement; SFDA Class III device manufacturing pathway support

partners.name: SFDA
partners.current: Medical device regulation; Class III device oversight
partners.upgrade: SFDA Class III implant manufacturing licence expedited process; Saudi implant performance database; ISO 13485 and ISO 14971 support for Saudi manufacturer

partners.name: Saudi Aramco Materials Technology
partners.current: Titanium and specialty metals experience from petrochemical; precision machining
partners.upgrade: Medical-grade titanium machining qualification; CNC precision machining for implant bodies; surface treatment process development

partners.name: King Abdullah International Medical Research Center
partners.current: Medical research; clinical studies; biomaterials research
partners.upgrade: Saudi dental implant clinical validation study; osseointegration research on Saudi-manufactured implants; KAIMRC clinical data for SFDA registration
